summary: Great matrix recording of a tight second set featuring The Other One > Wharf Rat > Sugar Magnolia from the 11/30/81 Dayton show.
review: The matrix source captures the performance with clear, well‑balanced sound, despite some metadata mix‑ups about the date and venue. Reviewers rave about the second set—especially the seamless The Other One > Wharf Rat > Sugar Magnolia sequence—and describe the playing as tight and energetic. Overall it’s a solid listening experience for Deadheads seeking a late‑1981 gem.

ai_rating.rationale: Two out of three reviewers gave 5‑star praise for both the show and its matrix recording, highlighting excellent second‑set performance; the third review only notes a metadata error but still calls the recording good.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix capture is clear and well balanced; reviewers call it 'great matrix' and note 'really good quality sound'. Minor issues revolve around incorrect date/venue tagging, not the audio itself.

standout_songs: The Other One > Wharf Rat > Sugar Magnolia
show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong, tight second set with seamless transitions; overall pacing praised as very good.
